name: shadcn/ui
useWhen: Use as the default accessible React and Tailwind component base.
avoidWhen: Avoid treating the default examples as a final visual direction.

name: Origin UI
useWhen: Use for practical app UI blocks and repeated product surfaces.
avoidWhen: Avoid when a highly custom visual identity is required.

name: Magic UI
useWhen: Use sparingly for approved motion-rich marketing sections.
avoidWhen: Avoid in dense enterprise tools or conservative trust pages.

name: Tremor
useWhen: Use when data visualization is central to the product experience.
avoidWhen: Avoid for brand-led consumer pages that do not need charts.
